name: Great Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Balsamic or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop all vegetables ready for blending.
2. Working in batches, blend all ingredients except hot sauce until a coarse puree.
3. Transfer gazpacho to a large bowl. Season to taste with hot sauce, salt, and pepper.
4. Refrigerate until well chilled, about 2 hours.
5. Can be prepared the day ahead. Ladle into bowls and serve.
6. Serves 8-10
7. Bon Appetit January 1996
